features: Assorted Fruit Flavors: Choose from three delicious and invigorating options: Watermelon Fresh for a juicy, cooling effect, Feelin' Grape for a tangy, refreshing twist, and Peachy Clean for a crisp, sweet burst of flavor. Perfect for those who love a little variety in their oral care routine.

Long-Lasting Freshness: Each flavor is designed to keep your mouth feeling clean, fresh, and revitalized throughout the day. The natural fruit-inspired formulas offer a fresh breath sensation that lasts long after brushing.

Effective Cleaning: This toothpaste is formulated to fight cavities, plaque, and bad breath while gently cleaning your teeth and gums. Its non-abrasive formula is tough on germs and stains but gentle on your enamel, helping maintain a bright, healthy smile.

Fun for All Ages: Perfect for kids and adults alike, the fun fruity flavors make brushing a more enjoyable and rewarding experience for the whole family. Say goodbye to the struggle of getting kids to brush their teeth—they’ll look forward to it with Nice Smile Toothpaste!

Gentle & Safe Formula: Free from harsh chemicals, dyes, and artificial flavors, our toothpaste is made with gentle, effective ingredients that are safe for everyday use. Enjoy a refreshing clean without worrying about any harmful additives.

Compact & Convenient: The 60ml tube is the ideal size for both home use and travel, ensuring you can keep your mouth fresh and your smile bright wherever you go. Whether you’re at home, on vacation, or at the office, this compact tube fits easily in your bag or toiletry kit.

Environmentally Friendly Packaging: In addition to providing a refreshing brushing experience, Nice Smile Toothpaste comes in eco-conscious packaging, helping you keep your smile fresh while also being mindful of the environment.
description: Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to toothbrush, brush teeth in circular motions for 2 minutes, rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. If more than a small amount is accidentally swallowed, seek medical advice immediately.
